name: compliance fetch: --skip-fresh bypasses gate per §2.17 but writes audit log entry with event:skip-fresh and framework_id
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch && echo "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z" > .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch/x.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/freshness-gate.sh" --framework-id x --fetch-frequency weekly --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z --skip-fresh --emit-audit "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/audit.jsonl" && grep -E "skip-fresh.*x" .claude-tdd-pro/audit.jsonl 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
